violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. Observed cooler that needs to be cleaned out more frequently.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. Food items in walk in cooler and refrigerator do not have dates.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floor, walls need cleaning.
Clean dry location, protected (1 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pts deducted)
